Attempting to inline `v` on the left‑hand side of an assignment must fail.

Regression test for issue #75200.

-- go.mod --
module example.com/a
go 1.18

-- c/c.go --
package c

import "fmt"

func _() {
    v := 13
    x := &v //@nocodeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable")
    x = (&v) //@nocodeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable")
    x = &(v) //@nocodeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable")
    fmt.Println(v, x)
}
